comments: Approved. The commit 11203ac correctly modifies only tasks/v0.8-archon-docs-analysis.md and adds the two Phase 2 execution artifacts. The analysis document successfully appends the live site findings, explicitly mentioning the Archon 'Command/Workflow/Isolation' conceptual triumvirate and mapping it to team-agents-cowork. No documentation files under EN/ or ZH/ were rewritten, no src/mcp-server/ logic was modified, and active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics were cleanly preserved in the implementation commit.
